name: synthex
description: AI agents modeled after a software startup org chart — specialized roles that synthesize to discover, build, ship, operate, and learn from production-quality software.

tools.name: synthex_init
tools.description: Initialize Synthex project configuration and document directories

tools.name: synthex_read_config
tools.description: Read and merge project configuration with Synthex defaults

tools.name: synthex_list_agents
tools.description: List all available Synthex agents with their roles and types
